summary: Matched a batch of menu-record functions under src/melee/mn, with supporting header/prototype edits, small data/static-header adjustments, and cleanup of adjacent menu count/stat logic. Evidence includes the PR body match list, changed-file metadata, diff excerpts for core files, and a bot report showing 21 new matches plus 6 unmatched-item improvements.

key_files.role: Matched mnCount_GetRowValue_Character and improved adjacent count-row value logic by extracting unlocked character/map counting helpers and removing a PAD_STACK use.
evidence_refs: diff:mncount.c adds mnCount_CountUnlockedChars and mnCount_CountUnlockedMaps; removes PAD_STACK(8)
pr_body:Match mnCount_GetRowValue_Character and improve adjacent count-row value logic

key_files.role: Matched mnDataDel_80250170 using local archive/assets temporaries and indexed StaticModelDesc access for repeated asset section loading.
evidence_refs: diff:mndatadel.c introduces HSD_Archive* archive and StaticModelDesc* assets for lbArchive_LoadSections

key_files.role: Adjusted literal suffixes in static data initializers.
evidence_refs: diff:mndatadel.static.h changes -0.1 to -0.1F and Vec3 float literals to F suffixes

key_files.role: Adjusted signatures and casts for diagram statistic helper functions; introduced MNDIAGRAM_SOURCE to distinguish one prototype shape.
evidence_refs: diff:mndiagram.c changes mnDiagram_GetHitPercentage and mnDiagram_GetAveragePlayerCount is_name_mode from u8 to int, with explicit u8 casts

key_files.role: Updated public prototypes for diagram helpers, including a conditional MNDIAGRAM_SOURCE prototype for mnDiagram_GetPlayPercentage.
evidence_refs: diff:mndiagram.h updates signatures and adds #ifdef MNDIAGRAM_SOURCE

key_files.role: Matched mnDiagram2_GetStatValue and mnDiagram2_UpdateScrollArrows with u16 temporaries, signature-call cleanup, HSD_GObjGetUserData, and a local data-layout struct for animation data.
evidence_refs: diff:mndiagram2.c adds val16, MnDiagram2DataLayout, HSD_GObjGetUserData, and base->anim[1]

key_files.role: Matched mnInfo_80251D58, mnInfo_80251F04, mnInfo_802522B8 and improved adjacent mnInfo code using layout casts, moved static data, scoped dont_inline pragmas, explicit text-slot pointer arithmetic, and helper extraction.
evidence_refs: diff:mninfo.c adds MnInfoDataLayout, mnInfo_CountUnlocked, scoped #pragma dont_inline around two functions, and changes mnInfo_80251D58 signature
bot_report:mnInfo_80251D58, mnInfo_80251F04, mnInfo_802522B8 to 100%; adjacent mnInfo functions improved

key_files.role: Header/prototype companion changes for mnInfo functions.
Header/prototype companion change for mnnamenew work.
Matched mn_80232D4C and improved adjacent data/sdata/sdata2/function items.
evidence_refs: bot_report:mn_80232D4C to 100%; mnruleplus .data, .sdata, .sdata2, mn_80233218 improved or matched

key_files.role: Header/prototype companion changes for mnruleplus work.
Matched four mnVibration functions and brought mnvibration data/sdata items to 100%.
evidence_refs: pr_body:Match mnVibration_80248444, mnVibration_80248644, mnVibration_80248ED4, and mnVibration_80249174

key_files.role: Header/prototype companion changes for mnvibration work.

what_changed: Matched 21 items according to the bot report, including functions across mnvibration, mnnamenew, mnsoundtest, mninfo, mndatadel, mndiagram2, mnruleplus, mnsnap, and mncount.
Improved 6 unmatched items according to the bot report, including adjacent mninfo, mnruleplus, and mncount items.
Updated several headers to reflect recovered or matching signatures, notably mndiagram.h, mninfo.h, mnruleplus.h, mnvibration.h, and mnnamenew.h.
Refactored repeated unlocked-character and unlocked-map counting in mncount.c into static inline helpers.
Introduced local layout structs in mninfo.c and mndiagram2.c to describe mixed data blocks used by matching code.
Used scoped #pragma dont_inline blocks around mnInfo_80251D58 and mnInfo_80251F04 in the diff excerpt.
Verification claimed in PR body: python configure.py --require-protos && ninja.

smart_moves.text: Extracting mnCount_CountUnlockedChars and mnCount_CountUnlockedMaps reduced duplicated loops and allowed mnCount_GetRowValue_Character and mnCount_GetRowValue_Number to share the same count logic.
Using StaticModelDesc* assets in mnDataDel_80250170 turned repeated adjacent globals into indexed accesses without replacing the asset-name string literals.
evidence_refs: diff:mndatadel.c assets=&mnDataDel_804A0918; assets[0..2] passed to lbArchive_LoadSections

smart_moves.text: For mnDiagram2_GetStatValue, assigning repeated u16 statistic field results through a shared val16 temporary avoided repeated direct returns for several parallel cases.
evidence_refs: diff:mndiagram2.c val16 used for sd_count, peak_damage, match_count, victories, losses

smart_moves.text: Using small local layout structs for known mixed data blocks made animation and format-string accesses more explicit than raw address arithmetic alone.
evidence_refs: diff:mndiagram2.c MnDiagram2DataLayout with stat_name_ids and anim
diff:mninfo.c MnInfoDataLayout with anim, sis_ids, date_format, time_format

smart_moves.text: Running require-protos as part of verification matched the PR's header/prototype surface area.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When repeated menu record logic differs only by character/stage index and predicate, try extracting narrow static inline helpers before preserving duplicated switch-case loops.
For adjacent static model descriptors loaded through repeated lbArchive_LoadSections arguments, a base pointer plus indexed fields can be a successful matching shape.
evidence_refs: diff:mndatadel.c changes mnDataDel_804A0918/0928/0938 field references to assets[0..2]

decomp_lessons.lesson: For mixed static data blobs, temporary local layout structs can document offsets for animations or format strings while keeping code reviewable, but the PR evidence supports only these local mnInfo/mnDiagram2 cases.
evidence_refs: diff:mninfo.c adds MnInfoDataLayout and uses layout->date_format/layout->time_format
diff:mndiagram2.c adds MnDiagram2DataLayout and uses base->anim[1]

decomp_lessons.lesson: If recovered function bodies require signature changes, update owning headers and verify with require-protos rather than relying on local declarations.

naming_conventions.name: mnCount_CountUnlockedChars
naming_conventions.convention: Subsystem prefix plus verb phrase describing the counted menu-record domain.

naming_conventions.name: mnCount_CountUnlockedMaps
naming_conventions.convention: Parallel naming with mnCount_CountUnlockedChars for shared row-value count logic.

naming_conventions.name: MnDiagram2DataLayout
naming_conventions.convention: PascalCase struct typedef naming a recovered local data layout for a menu file.

naming_conventions.name: MnInfoDataLayout
naming_conventions.convention: PascalCase struct typedef naming a recovered local mixed data layout.

naming_conventions.name: assets
naming_conventions.convention: Short semantic local for a StaticModelDesc base pointer used with indexed fields.

naming_conventions.name: val16
naming_conventions.convention: Width-indicating temporary for u16 statistic fields in a switch.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Remove narrow PAD_STACK after refactoring count logic.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The PR evidence shows improvement, not a full match for mnCount_GetRowValue_Number.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use explicit casts on widened int parameters where the code needs u8 behavior.
evidence_refs: diff:mndiagram.c casts is_name_mode to u8 in conditionals
diff:mndiagram2.c calls diagram helpers with int is_name_mode
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The diff supports this as a local signature/codegen tactic; it is not evidence for a global rule.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use a shared u16 temporary for multiple stat switch cases before returning as int.
evidence_refs: diff:mndiagram2.c val16 in VSSTAT_SD_COUNT, VSSTAT_PEAK_DAMAGE, VSSTAT_MATCH_COUNT, VSSTAT_VICTORIES, VSSTAT_LOSSES
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: Supported for the shown stat-field cases only.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use HSD_GObjGetUserData instead of direct gobj->user_data in mnDiagram2_UpdateScrollArrows.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: No review discussion explains whether this is preferred style or just local matching.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Scoped #pragma dont_inline push/pop around two mnInfo functions.
evidence_refs: diff:mninfo.c #pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on / #pragma pop around mnInfo_80251D58 and mnInfo_80251F04
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: Existing standards treat pragmas as exceptions. The PR provides match/build evidence but no reviewer discussion; do not generalize beyond this local case.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use local layout structs over mixed static data to access later fields by name.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The diff excerpt does not include full symbol/section ownership proof for these layouts.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Report showed matched code +0.19% (+7344 bytes), matched data +0.05% (+624 bytes), 21 new matches, and 6 improvements in unmatched items.

review_feedback.author: itsgrimetime
review_feedback.text: Author said they were cleaning up regressions and would mark ready once the report was clean.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs touching MnInfoDataLayout or mnInfo_803EFC08 to see whether the temporary mixed-data layout was replaced with stronger data ownership.
Search for subsequent changes to MNDIAGRAM_SOURCE and mnDiagram_GetPlayPercentage prototype handling.
Search for PAD_STACK removal in mncount or other src/melee/mn row-value functions.
Search for later review or cleanup of #pragma dont_inline in mnInfo_80251D58 and mnInfo_80251F04.
Search for StaticModelDesc indexed asset loading patterns around lbArchive_LoadSections in other menu files.
Search for HSD_GObjGetUserData adoption in nearby menu record functions.

evidence_refs: human_pr_text:PR body and author issue comment
notes: PR identity, changed files, claimed verification, and bot match results are well evidenced.

The raw diff is truncated, so details for later files such as mnvibration.c, mnruleplus.c, mnnamenew.c, mnsnap.c, and mnsoundtest.c are mostly supported by PR body, changed-file metadata, and bot report rather than visible hunks.
There were no review comments and no human reviewer feedback in the loaded slice.
The author mentioned regressions were being cleaned up before readiness, but the loaded evidence does not include the final clean report text beyond merge metadata and bot match data.
Do not infer broader project standards from local tactics such as scoped pragmas, conditional prototypes, or mixed-data layout structs without curator review and additional evidence.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Extract repeated menu count loops into narrow inline helpers when the repeated logic is identical.
accepted_candidate_records.text: In mncount.c, repeated unlocked character/map counting loops were extracted into mnCount_CountUnlockedChars and mnCount_CountUnlockedMaps. This coincided with mnCount_GetRowValue_Character reaching 100% and mnCount_GetRowValue_Number improving.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use local layout structs for recovered mixed menu data only with local match evidence.
accepted_candidate_records.text: mnInfoDataLayout and MnDiagram2DataLayout were introduced to access fields inside mixed static data blocks and contributed to matched mnInfo/mnDiagram2 functions. The evidence supports these local cases, not a blanket data-layout policy.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Header prototype changes should be paired with require-protos verification.
accepted_candidate_records.text: This matching PR changed multiple mn headers and reported verification with python configure.py --require-protos && ninja.

source_update_candidates.title: src/melee/mn contains menu record matching work for record/stat/info/vibration screens
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2564 matched menu record functions across src/melee/mn files including mncount, mndiagram, mndiagram2, mninfo, mnnamenew, mnruleplus, mnsnap, mnsoundtest, and mnvibration.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful source-owned path fact for routing future menu-record decomp searches; curator should validate against broader repository structure.

source_update_candidates.title: Consider adding examples of temporary mixed-data layout structs
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2564 used MnInfoDataLayout and MnDiagram2DataLayout to access mixed static data such as animation settings and format strings. This may be a useful example under typed-fields-over-pointer-math or data-sections-and-tu-splits, with a warning that section ownership evidence is still needed.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential example for an existing standard; should not be promoted without curator checking symbol/section ownership and later cleanup history.

rejection_notes: Do not promote scoped #pragma dont_inline as normal style; this PR only shows local use with match/build evidence and no review rationale.
Do not infer that MNDIAGRAM_SOURCE conditional prototypes are a preferred global pattern; the evidence only shows one local header workaround.

Do not treat the strange float-looking mnInfo_803EFC08 initializer data as semantically meaningful from this slice alone; it appears to be mixed data used for matching, but ownership and final representation are not fully evidenced here.
Do not claim reviewer approval details; no review comments are present in the loaded slice.
